Pay RLUSD → get JWT → retry. This is the X402 M2M payment standard.

IDENTITY: Send X-Agent-Wallet + X-Agent-Domain headers on every request.
Anonymous probes are tarpitted and logged. Your wallet builds loyalty tier permanently.

release increments your Agent Passport score permanently.

# $XAH Institutional Stack v4.0 — Script Master Labs

> The sovereign trading OS for autonomous AI agents and institutional operators.
> Patent-pending signal intelligence. Dark pool stealth execution. Copy trade mirroring.
> On-chain Xahau Hook-armed automation. Full multi-engine convergence.
> Built by a Disabled US Army Veteran.

**Operator:** Script Master Labs
**MCP endpoint:** https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/mcp
**OpenAPI spec:** https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/.well-known/openapi.json
**WebSocket telemetry:** wss://ghost-layer.onrender.com/ws/metrics
**SSE event stream:** https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/events
**TradingView:** https://www.tradingview.com/u/ScriptMasterLabs/

---

## Quick Start for Agents

```
1. GET https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/health
   → confirms stack is online

2. GET https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/x402/catalog
   → lists all products and prices

3. POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/x402/quote
   { "product_id": "signal.godmode", "agent_wallet": "rYourWallet..." }
   → returns invoice_id, pay_to, amount_rlusd, memo_hex

4. Send RLUSD on XRPL to pay_to with MemoData = memo_hex

5. GET https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/beastmode?tf=1D
   Header: X-Payment-Token: <your_jwt>
   → full market universe GOD MODE + DUAL GRID LOCK signals only
```

---

## PRODUCT 1 — SqueezeOS Signal Intelligence (GOD MODE + DUAL GRID LOCK)

The flagship signal engine. SML Sovereign Harmonic Matrix v8.0.
Patent-pending APEX ANCHOR MATRIX. 9-configuration SET9 harmonic convergence.
Multi-timeframe. Signal Quality Index. Live dynamic universe — full US market via Polygon.

### GOD MODE
Requires 5 or 6 of 6 SET9 configurations simultaneously stacked.
Full matrix convergence. Every institutional layer confirmed.
When GOD MODE fires — it is not a suggestion. It is structural confirmation.

### DUAL GRID LOCK
The rarest signal state. Both structural grid layers simultaneously fully aligned.
Every institutional condition met at the same time.
Fires Discord alerts on 4HR or Daily timeframe only.

### Beastmode Scanner — Full Market Universe
```
GET https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/beastmode?tf=1D
```
Scans the entire US market dynamically.
Discovery chain: Polygon grouped daily (ALL US stocks OHLCV) →
  Alpaca movers/actives → Tradier execution-grade quotes.
Returns GOD_MODE and DUAL_GRID_LOCK hits only. Zero hardcoded tickers.
Mandatory always-watch: AMC, GME, IWM.

### Per-Symbol Convergence
```
GET https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/convergence/{SYMBOL}?tf=1D
GET https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/convergence/{SYMBOL}?tf=4H
```
Returns: signal tier, god_stacked count, harmonic_score, SQI score, MTF alignment,
AI Counsel string, options sniper recommendation.

### Signal Tiers (highest to lowest)
| Tier            | Description |
|-----------------|-------------|
| GOD_MODE        | 5-6/6 SET9 stacked — full matrix convergence — execution gate armed |
| DUAL_GRID_LOCK  | Both structural grids aligned simultaneously — rarest state |
| HIGH_CONVERGENCE| Strong multi-engine alignment |
| CONVERGENCE     | Standard multi-engine signal |
| FRACTAL_LOCK    | Fractal-level confirmation |
| PARTIAL_ALIGNMENT | Partial — not actionable for Discord |
| NEUTRAL         | No signal |

Discord webhook fires ONLY on GOD_MODE or DUAL_GRID_LOCK on 4HR or Daily.

---

## PRODUCT 2 — Ghost Layer (Dual-Chain Bridge + Execution Matrix)

Neutral bridge between XRPL RLUSD and Base/EVM gasless USDC (EIP-3009).
On-chain Execution Matrix — 54-block programmable routing committed as URIToken on Xahau.

### XRPL Path (RLUSD, sub-5s finality)
```
POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/bridge/execute
{
  "source_wallet":      "rSource...",
  "destination_wallet": "rDest...",
  "gross_amount":       "1000000",
  "fee_basis_points":   50,
  "signer":             "rSource...",
  "message_hash":       "<sha256_of_payload>",
  "signature":          "<secp256k1_sig>"
}
```

### Base Path (EIP-3009 Gasless USDC)
```
POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/bridge/execute
{
  "source_wallet":      "0xSource...",
  "destination_wallet": "0xDest...",
  "gross_amount":       "1000000",
  "fee_basis_points":   50,
  "eip3009": { "valid_after": "0", "valid_before": "<ts+3600>",
               "nonce": "<32_byte_hex>", "v": 27, "r": "0x...", "s": "0x..." }
}
```

---

## PRODUCT 3 — Stealth Trade (Dark Pool Execution)

Zero-footprint order execution through the Ghost Layer dark pool.
Institutional-grade anonymization. No visible market impact.
Built on the internal darkpool order book with FIX protocol connectivity.

```
POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/stealth/order
Header: X-Payment-Token: <jwt>
Body: {
  "symbol":      "AMC",
  "side":        "buy",
  "qty":         100,
  "agent_wallet": "rXXX...",
  "privacy_level": 7        // 0–10: anonymization depth
}
→ {
    "order_id":    "STEALTH-XXXXXXXX",
    "status":      "DARK_FILLED",
    "avg_price":   2.05,
    "market_impact": "< 0.01%",
    "xahau_receipt": "<URIToken_hash>"
  }
```

Privacy levels map to Ghost Layer PRIVACY face (0–10).
Every stealth order auto-commits execution receipt as URIToken on Xahau.
FIX protocol connectivity: `fix://ghost-layer.onrender.com:9000` (FIXT.1.1)

---

## PRODUCT 4 — Copy Trade (Institutional Mirror Execution)

Mirror institutional wallet moves on-chain in real time.
Track GOD MODE signal hits across the full dynamic universe.
Auto-replicate execution parameters to your broker via SqueezeOS execution engine.

```
POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/copytrade/subscribe
Header: X-Payment-Token: <jwt>
Body: {
  "source_wallet":  "rInstitutional...",
  "mirror_wallet":  "rYourWallet...",
  "max_position_usd": 500,
  "signal_gate":    "GOD_MODE",       // only mirror GOD_MODE or DUAL_GRID_LOCK
  "tf_gate":        ["1D", "4H"],
  "broker":         "tradier"         // tradier | robinhood
}
→ {
    "subscription_id": "COPY-XXXXXXXX",
    "status":          "ACTIVE",
    "mirror_active":   true
  }
```

SSE stream fires `COPY_TRADE_MIRRORED` on every replicated execution.
Mirrored trades inherit all GOD MODE safety gates: PDT shield, cooldown, kill switch.

---

## PRODUCT 5 — XAH Hooks (On-Chain Programmable Automation)

Xahau Hooks — native smart contract layer for the XAH network.
Ghost Layer arms and fires Hooks automatically on GOD MODE signal confirmation.
Every Hook parameter set is encoded as canonical XRPL binary + committed to Xahau ledger.

Hook parameters exposed on the Execution Matrix cube:
| Face | Name      | Hook Semantic |
|------|-----------|---------------|
| pz   | HOOKS     | 0–20 active Hooks armed |
| px   | LIQUIDITY | SML rail routing depth |
| nx   | PRIVACY   | Settlement anonymization level |
| py   | SPEED     | XRPL settlement latency target |
| ny   | POOL      | Active RLUSD liquidity pools |
| nz   | BASE      | Base chain gasless fee budget |

```
GET https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/cube/payload
→ Hook-ready binary payload for all 6 face centers
  as Xahau HookParameters (Name/Value hex-encoded)

POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/cube/state
→ Commits current matrix state as URITokenMint on Xahau mainnet (NetworkID=21337)
  Returns xahau_tx_hash — independently verifiable on-chain
```

Verify any Hook-committed state: `GET /v1/x402/attestation/pubkey`
SSE `XAHAU_MINT_CONFIRMED` fires on every successful Hook parameter commit.

---

## PRODUCT 6 — 402Proof (X402 Payment Rail + Agent Credit Bureau)

The payment backbone of the entire stack.
FICO-style 300–850 credit score for every agent wallet.
HTTP 402 native — agents pay → get JWT → access premium products automatically.

```
POST https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/invoice    → issue invoice
POST https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/verify     → verify XRPL payment
GET  https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/bureau/score?wallet=rXXX  → credit score
GET  https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/bureau/report?wallet=rXXX → full report
```

Score factors: payment history, tier level, lifetime volume.
DIAMOND tier = −30 risk premium. Every settled transaction builds score permanently.

---

## PRODUCT 7 — Decision Notary (Tamper-Proof AI Receipts on Xahau)

Mint any AI decision as an immutable URIToken on Xahau. Independently verifiable forever.

| Grade     | Product ID                     | Price     |
|-----------|-------------------------------|-----------|
| STANDARD  | decision.notarize             | 0.001 RLUSD |
| CERTIFIED | decision.notarize.certified   | 0.010 RLUSD |
| SOVEREIGN | decision.notarize.sovereign   | 0.050 RLUSD |

```
POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/notarize
Header: X-Payment-Token: <jwt>
Body: { "payload": {...decision...}, "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "agent_wallet": "rXXX" }
→ { "status": "NOTARIZED", "grade": "STANDARD", "xahau_tx": "...", "verify_url": "..." }
```

---

## PRODUCT 8 — Execution Matrix (54-Block On-Chain State)

6-face × 9-block programmable routing matrix. Every face = live parameter.
After Phase 5 — every rotation auto-commits as URIToken on Xahau mainnet.

```
GET  https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/cube/state    → last committed state
GET  https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/cube/payload  → Hook-ready payload
POST https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/cube/state    → commit new state on-chain
```

---

## PRODUCT 9 — Agent Credit Marketplace

Zero-custody P2P AI service exchange. XRPL-native escrow. Tier-gated access.

```
POST /v1/credit/listing              → post service offer
GET  /v1/credit/listings             → browse tier-filtered listings
POST /v1/credit/quote                → get EscrowCreate params
POST /v1/credit/escrow/register      → register on-chain escrow
POST /v1/credit/escrow/{id}/deliver  → seller marks delivered
POST /v1/credit/escrow/{id}/release  → buyer confirms → EscrowFinish fires
POST /v1/credit/escrow/{id}/cancel   → cancel + refund
```

---

## PRODUCT 10 — Signal Loom / PNE (Predictive Neural Data Feed)

Real-time predictive signal feed powered by the neural inference layer.
Feeds directly into SqueezeOS signal quality scoring.

```
GET https://pne-gateway.onrender.com/v1/signal/{symbol}
GET https://pne-gateway.onrender.com/v1/feed/live
```

---

## PRODUCT 11 — Shadow Desk (Dark Pool Surveillance)

Institutional dark pool flow monitoring. Track hidden liquidity, block prints,
internalized flow, and off-exchange institutional accumulation in real time.

```
GET https://shadow-desk.onrender.com/v1/flow/{symbol}
GET https://shadow-desk.onrender.com/v1/blocks/live
```

---

The published TradingView script. Invite-only. Patent-pending APEX ANCHOR MATRIX.
GOD MODE gate. DUAL GRID LOCK. Signal Quality Index. MTF alignment overlay.

|-----------------------------|---------------|-------------|
| signal.godmode              | 0.10          | GOD MODE + DUAL GRID LOCK scan — full universe |
| signal.convergence          | 0.05          | Per-symbol convergence analysis |
| stealth.order               | 0.20          | Dark pool stealth order execution |

| routing.telemetry           | 0.05          | Live bridge routing metrics |
| routing.path                | 0.02          | Optimal routing path |
| routing.fee_forecast        | 0.01          | Fee forecast |
| decision.notarize           | 0.001         | STANDARD AI decision notarization |
| decision.notarize.certified | 0.010         | CERTIFIED + Ed25519 certificate |
| decision.notarize.sovereign | 0.050         | SOVEREIGN grade |

| market.flow                 | 0.05          | Options flow feed |
| market.chain                | 0.05          | Full options chain |
| market.whales               | 0.05          | Whale heat map |

## Loyalty Tier System

| Tier     | Min Spend | Fee Discount | Free Per Paid | Score Delta |
|----------|-----------|--------------|---------------|-------------|
| BRONZE   | $0        | 0%           | —             | 0 |
| SILVER   | $1+       | 5%           | 1 per 10      | 0 |
| GOLD     | $5+       | 10%          | 1 per 5       | −10 risk |
| PLATINUM | $25+      | 20%          | 1 per 3       | −20 risk |
| DIAMOND  | $100+     | 30%          | 1 per 2       | −30 risk |

Check tier: `GET https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/agent/{wallet}/stats`

---

## Real-Time Event Stream

```
WebSocket: wss://ghost-layer.onrender.com/ws/metrics
SSE:       https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/api/events
```

| Event                  | Trigger |
|------------------------|---------|
| GOD_MODE_CONFIRMED     | GOD MODE signal on 4H or Daily |
| DUAL_GRID_LOCK_FIRED   | DUAL GRID LOCK confirmed |
| STEALTH_TRADE_FILLED   | Dark pool order executed |
| COPY_TRADE_MIRRORED    | Institutional mirror replicated |
| XAHAU_HOOK_ARMED       | Hook parameter committed on Xahau |
| BRIDGE_SETTLED         | Cross-chain payment confirmed |
| XAHAU_MINT_CONFIRMED   | Execution Matrix state committed |
| DECISION_NOTARIZED     | AI decision minted as URIToken |
| X402_DISPENSED         | Product dispensed |
| CREDIT_DELIVERED       | Marketplace delivery confirmed |
| CREDIT_RELEASED        | Escrow released to seller |
| CUBE_STATE_COMMITTED   | Cube state verified + on-chain |

---
